name: Neon Nomad - SKYNZ Founding Badge
description: A legendary collectible badge granting exclusive access to SKYNZ Creator Command Page features. Neon Nomad holders unlock premium customization, priority support, and passive revenue sharing.

page_customization.name: Unlimited Theme Customization
page_customization.description: Access all 5 premium themes (Boombox, Jukebox, Rocket Control Center, CEO Desk, Night Vibe Lounge) with unlimited color customization

priority_support.name: 24/7 Priority Email Support
priority_support.description: Direct email support with guaranteed 1-hour response time

revenue_share.name: 2% Platform Revenue Share
revenue_share.description: Earn 2% of all SKYNZ platform revenue monthly (passive income)

badge_marketplace.name: Exclusive Badge Marketplace Listing
badge_marketplace.description: Priority listing on Magic Eden and Tensor with featured placement

advanced_analytics.name: Advanced Real-Time Analytics
advanced_analytics.description: Detailed visitor analytics, engagement metrics, revenue tracking, and predictive insights

unlimited_streaming.name: Unlimited Live Streaming Duration
unlimited_streaming.description: Stream for unlimited hours without platform restrictions

developer_api.name: Full Developer API Access
developer_api.description: Complete REST & GraphQL API access for custom integrations and third-party apps

custom_domain.name: Custom Domain Support
custom_domain.description: Use your own custom domain (e.g., yourname.skynz.io or custom.com)

white_label.name: White Label Option
white_label.description: Remove SKYNZ branding and use your own brand identity

early_access.name: Early Access to New Features
early_access.description: Beta test new SKYNZ features before general release
